synopsis:
Star Wars (2020) #17 is the seventeenth issue of the comic series Star Wars (2020, and is part of the War of the Bounty Hunters cross-over event
SITH LORD DARTH VADER has discovered that his son, Jedi Knight LUKE SKYWALKER, is finally within striking distance. He will pursue him to the very ends of space…Who is hunting whom?
Meanwhile, LEIA ORGANA battles the forces of CRIMSON DAWN to regain her lost love, HAN SOLO.
title: Star Wars (2020) #17
